channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ex-Yankees star Joba Chamberlain offers sound advice on how to deal with midges before Guardians-Tigers game
item.description: Former New York Yankees star Joba Chamberlain offered advice to players in the Guardians-Tigers series on how to deal with annoying pests on Lake Erie.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hurricane Milton forces NFL, NHL and other sporting events to adjust game plans
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are planning to relocate to the New Orleans area to prepare for Sunday’s game against the Saints with Hurricane Milton expected to make landfall along Florida’s west coast this week.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: IndyCar partners with Dallas Cowboys and Texas Rangers for 2026 street race in Arlington
item.description: IndyCar will return to Texas in 2026 with a street race in Arlington in a joint venture between the Dallas Cowboys and the official events partner of the Texas Rangers.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Flyers' Matvei Michkov leads the latest infusion of Russian talent into the NHL
item.description: Matvei Michkov is in the NHL ahead of schedule after the Philadelphia Flyers got him out of Russia and to North America a little over a year after taking him with the seventh pick in the draft.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Sammy Smith secures first 2024 Xfinity win at Talladega
item.description: TALLADEGA, Ala. (NEXSTAR) — In an exciting finish at the iconic Talladega Superspeedway, 20-year-old Sammy Smith captured his first win of the 2024 season, taking the checkered flag in the United Rentals 250.
item.dc:creator: Darryl Burke, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers arrested on assault, drug possession charges
item.description: New England Patriots safety and team captain Jabrill Peppers was arrested early Saturday morning on assault and drug possession charges, police announced on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tossed balls from stands, apparently aimed at Profar, interrupt Padres' win in NLDS Game 2
item.description: Dodger Stadium fans tossed baseballs, apparently at San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar, and then threw trash that caused a 12-minute wait between pitches during the seventh inning of NL Division Series Game 2.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Karl-Anthony Towns scores 10 points in abbreviated preseason debut with New York Knicks
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Jalen Brunson thought twice about going 1-on-2 in transition, instead dribbled back outside and flipped the ball behind him to Karl-Anthony Towns, who made a 3-pointer with a defender in his face.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Justin Tucker's field goal after Derrick Henry's big run lifts Ravens to a wild 41-38 overtime win
item.description: CINCINNATI (AP) — Lamar Jackson and Joe Burrow traded touchdown throws all afternoon. It took a big run and a chip-shot kick in overtime to settle a wild game between the Baltimore Ravens and Cincinnati Bengals.
item.dc:creator: MITCH STACY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Phillies bench slumping third baseman Alec Bohm in Game 2 of the NLDS
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Looking for any kind of jolt for a slumping offense, the Philadelphia Phillies benched All-Star third baseman Alec Bohm for Game 2 of the NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lightning preseason game against Nashville canceled
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning preseason game scheduled for Monday against the Nashville Predators has been canceled due to Hurricane Milton, the team announced Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Caleb Williams, Bears offense overwhelm Panthers, advance to 3-2
item.description: CHICAGO — Caleb Williams continued his improvement with a breakout game Sunday against the Carolina Panthers, as the Chicago Bears used a first-half offensive blitz to cruise to an easy victory Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies get run over by Boise State, 62-30
item.description: BOISE (ABC4 Sports) - Ashton Jeanty ran for 186 yards and three touchdowns on 13 first-half carries, while former American Fork High School quarterback Maddux Madsen passed for 256 yards and three TDs and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Who plays for the Los Angeles Clippers this year? Here's a breakdown of the roster
item.description: Yet another NBA offseason has come and gone, with some major free agent signings taking place and some big names being selected in this year’s draft.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Utes to play baseball at Smith's Ballpark next season
item.description: The University of Utah has partnered up with Salt Lake City and the Salt Lake Bees to have the Utes play baseball at Smith's Ballpark during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Bowles says the Buccaneers will learn from their mistakes in overtime loss to division-rival Falcons
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have no one to blame but themselves for failing to take advantage of an opportunity to tighten their grip on first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Here's where SoFi ranks among NFL's best (and worst) stadiums
item.description: SoFi Stadium in Inglewood is not the best stadium in the NFL but it did crack the top five, according to a survey released Thursday. Lumen Field, the home of the Seattle Seahawks, was named the best stadium for football fans to visit in USA Today's rankings of all NFL stadiums.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Grand Junction softball pours it on Palisade for big league win
item.description: With a clear blue sky and beautiful Mt. Garfield as the backdrop at Palisade High School, it was the Grand Junction Tigers show on the softball field.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Backlash over San Jose State University transgender volleyball player 'isn't about sports,' advocates say
item.description: (KRON) -- Four teams forfeited matches against the San Jose State University women's volleyball team since a lawsuit was filed on behalf of several NCAA athletes, including SJSU's team captain. According to the lawsuit filed on September 23, one of SJSU's volleyball players is transgender.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Yankees playoff tickets cost more in Kansas City than the Bronx
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) --- So, not everything is more expensive in New York City. Yankees fans will shell out less cash for a seat at Yankees Stadium than Kauffman Stadium in Kansas City when the American League Division Series kicks off Saturday at Yankee Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Mira Wassef, PIX 11

item.title: Real Salt Lake plays Minnesota to scoreless draw
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring eight goals in its last three games, Real Salt Lake was unable to find the back of the net in a scoreless draw with Minnesota Wednesday night at America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers issue statement on Fernando Valenzuela's status
item.description: Dodgers broadcaster and former player Fernando Valenzuela has been hospitalized and will miss the playoffs this year, but the team is hopeful he will return for next season.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Legendary Dodgers pitcher, broadcaster Fernando Valenzuela hospitalized
item.description: Dodgers broadcaster Fernando Valenzuela has been hospitalized ahead of the team's playoff run. The popular Spanish-language broadcaster and former Dodger star pitcher stepped away from his playcalling duties last week, though no reason was given at the time, according to the Orange County Register.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: What to know about the Padres Wild Card Series at Petco Park
item.description: If you are heading to the game, here are some things to know about the best-of-three National League Wild Card Series matchup between the Padres and Atlanta Braves:
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies face another tough challenge at #21 Boise State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Aggies have had two weeks to stew in that second half collapse at Temple when they got outscored in the second half 28-8 to fall to 1-3 on the season. "Obviously, our record is not what we want," said quarterback Spencer Petras on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Baseball legend Pete Rose dies at 83
item.description: Pete Rose, Major League Baseball’s all-time hits leader who endured a lifetime ban for betting on the sport, has died at age 83, his agent Jeff Lenkov confirmed to KTLA 5 News. According to TMZ, Rose died at his home in Las Vegas on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5
